name: Sour Cream Wheat Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons apple juice, bottled or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine sour cream and apple juice.
3. Add egg beaters, sugar, salt, and baking soda to the mixture; stir until well combined.
4. Mix in gluten and whole-wheat flour until a shaggy dough forms.
5. Stir in yeast and mix until smooth.
6. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth (about 5 minutes).
7. Place the dough in an oiled bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place for about 1 hour or until doubled in size.
8. Punch down the dough and shape into two loaves.
9. Place the loaves on a greased baking sheet and let rise again for 30 minutes.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and hollow to the touch.
11. Remove from the oven and cool on a wire rack before slicing.
